input.background: The air quality data in Exercise 12.5 (Table 12.9) are associated with the summary statistics reported in Table 12.12.
input.question: Calculate a $95 \%$ confidence interval for $\mu_1-\mu_2$, again without assuming equal variance. Use the conservative degrees of freedom to help calculate the confidence interval.

site.description: The location where air samples were collected.

n.description: The number of air samples collected at each site.

mean.description: The average particulate matter concentration at each site.

std_dev.description: The standard deviation of particulate matter concentration at each site.

mu_diff.description: The difference in mean particulate matter concentration between the two sites.
